items.title: Spot unsafe food? FSSAI wants you to report it
items.summary: Regulator steps up 'Be the Eyes of Food Safety' campaign, urges consumers to flag unhygienic kitchens and unsafe food through its Food Safety Connect platform
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
items.summary: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.
